text.title: cqrs-pattern Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the cqrs-pattern methodology end-to-end.

step.name: list-commands-and-queries
step.action: Enumerate write operations (commands) and read operations (queries) separately.

step.name: author-handlers
step.action: For each command, write CommandHandler; for each query, QueryHandler.
step.decision-gate: Never combine — if a single use case needs both, split into two handlers.

step.name: wire-mediator
step.action: Register each handler in the Mediator at composition root.

step.name: design-read-side
step.action: Pick read-side storage (Redis / view / Elasticsearch); author projection update path.
